title: Senior Doctor - Shroff Eye Centre - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Shroff Eye Centre - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre:
Shroff Eye Centre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
